hero.title: Manage Construction Projects Smarter
hero.subtitle: Coordinate projects, hire the right specialists, validate deliverables, and source materials from one professional workspace built for construction management.
hero.snapshotTitle: One view for planning, staffing, and supply
hero.imageAlt: Construction planning session with project documents

features.title: Everything needed to run construction work with clarity
features.subtitle: The platform brings operations, hiring, material sourcing, and review into a single reliable workspace.
features.projectManagementDescription: Organize construction tasks, track milestones, and keep every chantier on schedule.
features.marketplaceDescription: Browse manufacturer catalogs, compare product offers, and access documentation quickly.
features.validationDescription: Bring expert oversight into the workflow to review progress and validate key decisions.
features.collaborationDescription: Connect artisans, experts, and manufacturers in one shared space for smoother coordination.

actors.title: Built around the people who keep projects moving
actors.subtitle: Each role gets a focused experience while staying connected to the rest of the construction ecosystem.
actors.artisanDescription: Apply for jobs, manage assigned work, and stay connected to project teams in real time.
actors.expertDescription: Create projects, review progress, and validate key construction decisions with confidence.
actors.manufacturerDescription: Publish product catalogs, manage documentation, and reach construction professionals directly.

steps.title: A clear flow from kickoff to delivery
steps.subtitle: Simple steps keep the platform easy to adopt while still supporting serious project execution.
steps.step1Description: Set up a construction project, define needs, and organize the work structure from day one.
steps.step2Description: Artisans discover open opportunities while experts and managers review the right candidates.
steps.step3Description: Track work, coordinate stakeholders, and keep documentation and supply activity aligned.

auth.title: Start with the role that fits your work
auth.subtitle: Join the platform to publish projects, apply for work, manage product catalogs, and collaborate across the construction lifecycle.
auth.roleBasedDescription: Each actor sees tools tailored to their responsibilities.
auth.fastAccessDescription: Create an account or log in from the same modern entry point.

footer.subtitle: Construction management, sourcing, and collaboration in one platform.
footer.bottom: Experts, artisans, and manufacturers working smarter together.

signIn.title: Welcome Back
signIn.subtitle: Sign in to your account
signIn.fixErrors: Please fix form errors before submitting.
signIn.resetSent: Reset code sent to your email.

signUp.title: Create Account
signUp.subtitle: Register as expert, artisan or manufacturer
signUp.networkFailed: Cannot reach server. Check API base URL.
signUp.fixErrors: Please fix form errors before submitting.

artisan.myProjectsDescription: Track your assigned work, open project details, and update daily progress from one clean space.
artisan.dailyTasksDescription: Your latest milestone updates for today.
artisan.selectProjectForTasks: Select a project with milestones to start logging daily work.
artisan.workspaceSubtitle: Move between dashboard, details, and calendar without leaving your artisan area.

project.detailsEmpty: Select a project to view its execution details.
project.noDescription: No project description has been added yet.
project.createMilestoneDescription: Assign a focused task to one artisan on this project.
project.reviewTasks: Review the tasks assigned to your team.
project.trackTasks: Track your assigned milestones and update today's work.
project.noMilestones: No milestones created for this project yet.

premium.modalSubtitle: Unlock project planning tools and smoother scheduling with a simple premium upgrade.
premium.calendarLocked: Calendar access is a premium feature.
premium.projectCreationLocked: Project creation is available for premium users.
premium.unlockProjectCreation: Upgrade to premium to create your own projects and keep your planning tools in one place.
premium.confirmationFailed: We could not confirm your premium subscription.
premium.cancelConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel your premium subscription now?
premium.cancelFailed: We could not cancel your premium subscription.

calendarUi.calendarDescription: Projects appear by duration, and daily task updates are shown as calendar events.
